input_text: "Riga is outside America. Paul, a carpenter, carried a box. Mary went to the bathroom. A coffee cup broke. This book is more interesting than that one. The stone was heavy. Jessica is a mouse. Mr Dursley is a catholic. The chef cooked a meal for the guests. Sandra moved to the garden. Bears quickly eat berries in a deep forest. The song sung by Eve was sad. A kitchen door was open. If X1 is a father of Y1, Y1 is a child of X1. Anna handed Mark a key. The bike's length is 10 kilometers. The horse kept in the stable was calm. Clinton defeated Dole. Mike or Mickey are not female. The picture was painted by Leo. The cat slept on the velvet sofa. Tallinn is in Estonia. Sue is a true patriot. Winona is a sheep. John is a bear. The teacher showed the students a map. If X is cool and nice then X is red. Elephants are big. Daniel journeyed to the office. Muggles cannot disappear. The city was destroyed. A village road was narrow. Apparently, Tom left early. The guide offered the tourists tea. John quickly eats berries in a deep forest?
